templates.template: {PLAYER} must end every sentence by saying 'Ho ho ho'.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer has to say 'Ho ho ho'.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the 'Ho ho ho', drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot use their hands to touch their glass; they must ask for help.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} uses their hands, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must wear a Santa hat (or something that looks like it).
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} can take off the hat now.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} takes off the hat, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot say the word 'Christmas'.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says 'Christmas', drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must laugh like Santa (Ho, ho, ho!) before each drink.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't laugh like that, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot sit down as long as others are standing.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} sits down, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must act like a reindeer every time someone says their name.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't act like a reindeer, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot drink their own drink; another player must give it to them.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} drinks alone, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must refer to everyone as 'My little elf'.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the nickname, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot say 'Yes' or 'No'.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says a forbidden word, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must dance to an imaginary Christmas carol every time they drink.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't dance, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot look at their phone.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} can look at their phone now.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} looks at their phone, drink {DRINKS} sips for being antisocial.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must drink with their pinky finger raised like a wise man.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} lowers their pinky, drink {DRINKS} sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot speak without first asking for permission from Santa (the host).
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} speaks without permission, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must imitate a Christmas toy every time they are assigned a challenge.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't act, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot touch the ground with bare feet (if they are).
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} touches the ground, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must say 'It's a Christmas miracle!' after every correct answer.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the miracle, drink {DRINKS} sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot drink if there is no music playing.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} drinks without music, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must keep their hands on their hips like a snowman.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} lowers their arms, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot use words containing the letter 'R'.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says the letter 'R', drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must wink every time they drink.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't wink, drink {DRINKS} extra sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot mention names of Christmas foods.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} mentions food, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must act as if they are very cold whenever they speak.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} speaks normally, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot drink with the hand they normally use.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} goes back to their habitual hand.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} uses their good hand, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must thank Santa after every drink.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer needs to be grateful.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets to say thanks, drink {DRINKS} sip.
